question_en: How is Bitcoin first framed in the opening unit?
choices_en: As a monetary alternative to fiat debasement
As a version of online banking
explanation_en: The opening frames Bitcoin as a monetary alternative to a debasing fiat order.
explanation_ko: 서두는 비트코인을 가치가 희석되는 법정화폐 질서에 대한 통화 대안으로 제시한다.
